findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name User-controlled path in ReadTrustedStep reaching file operations
 * @description The path parameter in ReadTrustedStep flowing to SCM or file read operations
 * @kind path-problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/read-trusted-path-traversal
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-078
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.FlowSources

module ReadTrustedPathConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    // Parameters of the step execution (run method, etc.)
    exists(Parameter p |
      p.getCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() = "ReadTrustedStep" or
      p.getCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() = "Execution" and
      p.getCallable().getDeclaringType().getEnclosingType().getName() = "ReadTrustedStep"
    |
      source.asParameter() = p
    )
    or
    // Fields of ReadTrustedStep (path field from @DataBoundConstructor)
    exists(FieldAccess fa |
      fa.getField().getDeclaringType().getName() = "ReadTrustedStep" and
      (fa.getField().hasName("path") or fa.getField().hasName("file"))
    |
      source.asExpr() = fa
    )
    or
    source instanceof RemoteFlowSource
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    // Runtime.exec()
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("exec") and
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.lang", "Runtime") and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getAnArgument()
    )
    or
    // ProcessBuilder
    exists(ClassInstanceExpr ce |
      ce.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.lang", "ProcessBuilder") and
      sink.asExpr() = ce.getAnArgument()
    )
    or
    // FilePath operations
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("hudson", "FilePath") and
      (mc.getMethod().hasName("act") or mc.getMethod().hasName("child") or 
       mc.getMethod().hasName("readToString") or mc.getMethod().hasName("read")) and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getAnArgument()
    )
    or
    // SCM checkout/read
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      (mc.getMethod().hasName("checkout") or mc.getMethod().hasName("fetch")) and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getAnArgument()
    )
  }
}

module ReadTrustedPathFlow = TaintTracking::Global<ReadTrustedPathConfig>;
import ReadTrustedPathFlow::PathGraph

from ReadTrustedPathFlow::PathNode source, ReadTrustedPathFlow::PathNode sink
where ReadTrustedPathFlow::flowPath(source, sink)
select sink.getNode(), source, sink, "Path injection from $@.", source.getNode(), "user-controlled path"
findings.hypothesis: User-controlled path parameter in ReadTrustedStep flowing to file/SCM operations

Path injection from [user-controlled path](1).
Path injection from [user-controlled path](2).
Path injection from [user-controlled path](1).
Path injection from [user-controlled path](1).
Path injection from [user-controlled path](1).

findings.hypothesis: Precise path flow from ReadTrustedStep path field to checkout/FilePath operations

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name ReadTrustedStep path to checkout or SCM command execution
 * @description Check if user-supplied path in readTrusted() flows into SCM checkout/fetch that invokes git/svn commands
 * @kind path-problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/readtrusted-scm-command
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-078
 *       external/cwe/cwe-088
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

module ReadTrustedSCMConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    // Constructor parameter of ReadTrustedStep (the path argument)
    exists(Parameter p |
      p.getCallable() instanceof Constructor and
      p.getCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() = "ReadTrustedStep"
    |
      source.asParameter() = p
    )
    or
    // Field access of path in ReadTrustedStep
    exists(FieldAccess fa |
      fa.getField().getDeclaringType().getName() = "ReadTrustedStep"
    |
      source.asExpr() = fa
    )
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    // FilePath.child() - path traversal risk
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("child") and
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("hudson", "FilePath") and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getArgument(0)
    )
    or
    // SCMSource/SCM checkout with path arg
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      (mc.getMethod().hasName("checkout") or 
       mc.getMethod().hasName("fetch") or
       mc.getMethod().hasName("getTrustedRevision")) and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getAnArgument()
    )
    or
    // Any method named after common SCM ops
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("withPath") and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getAnArgument()
    )
    or
    // String concatenation ultimately passed to exec/process
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("exec") and
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.lang", "Runtime") and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getAnArgument()
    )
  }
}

module ReadTrustedSCMFlow = TaintTracking::Global<ReadTrustedSCMConfig>;
import ReadTrustedSCMFlow::PathGraph

from ReadTrustedSCMFlow::PathNode source, ReadTrustedSCMFlow::PathNode sink
where ReadTrustedSCMFlow::flowPath(source, sink)
select sink.getNode(), source, sink, 
  "ReadTrustedStep: user-supplied path '$@' flows unsanitized to sensitive SCM/file operation.", 
  source.getNode(), "user path"
findings.hypothesis: User path in readTrusted() step flows into SCM operations that could invoke shell commands with the path as argument

message.text:
ReadTrustedStep: user-supplied path '[user path](1)' flows unsanitized to sensitive SCM/file operation.
ReadTrustedStep: user-supplied path '[user path](2)' flows unsanitized to sensitive SCM/file operation.

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Argument injection via user-controlled path in SCM operations
 * @description User-controlled path from readTrusted used as argument to tools like git without sanitization
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/argument-injection-scm
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-088
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

// Find all places in ReadTrustedStep where the path field is used
// in method calls that could be argument injection vectors
from FieldAccess fa, MethodCall mc
where
  fa.getField().getDeclaringType().getName() = "ReadTrustedStep" and
  fa.getFile().getBaseName() = "ReadTrustedStep.java" and
  (
    // Direct use as argument  
    mc.getAnArgument() = fa
    or
    // Used as argument after local flow
    exists(Expr arg |
      mc.getAnArgument() = arg and
      DataFlow::localExprFlow(fa, arg)
    )
  )
select fa, 
  "ReadTrustedStep field '" + fa.getField().getName() + 
  "' used as argument to " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + 
  "." + mc.getMethod().getName() + 
  " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: ReadTrustedStep path field used directly as argument to SCM tool invocations enabling argument injection

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name SCMBinder branch name argument injection
 * @description Branch name in SCMBinder flowing to checkout or command operations
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/scmbinder-argument-injection
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-078
 *       external/cwe/cwe-088
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking

// Find all method calls in SCMBinder and what arguments they use
from MethodCall mc, FieldAccess fa
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() = "SCMBinder" and
  fa.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() = "SCMBinder" and
  (
    mc.getAnArgument() = fa
    or
    exists(Expr arg |
      mc.getAnArgument() = arg and
      DataFlow::localExprFlow(fa, arg)
    )
  )
select mc, 
  "SCMBinder field '" + fa.getField().getName() + 
  "' used as argument to " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + 
  "." + mc.getMethod().getName() + 
  " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: SCMBinder branch names flowing to command arguments without sanitization

message.text: SCMBinder field 'scriptPath' used as argument to SCMFileSystem.child at line 110
SCMBinder field 'scriptPath' used as argument to SCMFileSystem.child at line 124
SCMBinder field 'scriptPath' used as argument to Messages.ReadTrustedStep__has_been_modified_in_an_untrusted_revis at line 130

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name ResolveScmStep targets argument injection
 * @description User-controlled targets/URLs in ResolveScmStep flowing to SCM operations
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/resolvescmstep-argument-injection
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-078
 *       external/cwe/cwe-088
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

// Find all method calls in ResolveScmStep and what field arguments they use
from MethodCall mc, FieldAccess fa
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() = "ResolveScmStep" and
  fa.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() = "ResolveScmStep" and
  (
    mc.getAnArgument() = fa
    or
    exists(Expr arg |
      mc.getAnArgument() = arg and
      DataFlow::localExprFlow(fa, arg)
    )
  )
select mc,
  "ResolveScmStep field '" + fa.getField().getName() +
  "' used as argument to " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() +
  "." + mc.getMethod().getName() +
  " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: User-controlled targets/URLs in ResolveScmStep flowing to SCM invocations without sanitization

message.text: ResolveScmStep field 'targets' used as argument to Collections.unmodifiableList at line 114

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name SCMBinder scriptPath flows to SCMFileSystem.child without any validation
 * @description Verify no sanitization exists for scriptPath before SCMFileSystem.child() in SCMBinder
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/scmbinder-no-validation
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-088
 */

import java

// Check what validation calls exist on scriptPath in SCMBinder
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getFile().getBaseName() = "SCMBinder.java" and
  (
    mc.getMethod().hasName("matches") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("contains") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("startsWith") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("normalize") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("validate") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("sanitize") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("replace") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("replaceAll") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("checkDoesNotContain") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("checkPath") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("isNormalized") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("child") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("checkout")
  )
select mc,
  "SCMBinder.java line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": " +
  mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getMethod().getName() +
  " - in method: " + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName()
findings.hypothesis: SCMBinder scriptPath used without any path validation before SCMFileSystem.child()

message.text: SCMBinder.java line 110: SCMFileSystem.child - in method: create
SCMBinder.java line 124: SCMFileSystem.child - in method: create

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Missing sanitization check for path with shell metacharacters
 * @description Find paths used in SCM file operations without any validation/sanitization
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/path-no-sanitization
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-078
 *       external/cwe/cwe-088
 */

import java

// Look for any sanitization/validation logic applied to path or scriptPath
// in ReadTrustedStep and SCMBinder
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getFile().getBaseName() = "ReadTrustedStep.java" and
  (
    mc.getMethod().hasName("matches") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("contains") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("startsWith") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("normalize") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("validate") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("sanitize") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("replace") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("replaceAll") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("checkDoesNotContain") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("checkPath") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("isNormalized")
  )
select mc, "Sanitization/validation call at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": " + mc.getMethod().getName()
findings.hypothesis: Check whether any sanitization is applied to the path parameter before use in ReadTrustedStep

message.text: Sanitization/validation call at line 136: startsWith
Sanitization/validation call at line 136: replace
Sanitization/validation call at line 136: replace
